subcodes.first_line: The Sun of Truth hath dawned above the horizon of the Will of God, glorified be His majesty, and the Supreme Horizon hath been illumined through the Name of the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آفتاب حقیقت از افق اراده حق جل جلاله مشرق و افق اعلی باسم مالک اسما منور و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
